resume_action.description: [0/12] 并行 1 任务 (PILOT), 预计 60min: p1_fm2_continuous_metrics→GPU[2]

experiment_monitor.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Sibyl Experiment Monitor: watch for task completion on default
# Tasks: p1_fm2_continuous_metrics
# Poll every 300s, timeout: 120min

MARKER="/tmp/sibyl_CRA_31018c0eb4_exp_monitor.json"
REMOTE_DIR="/home/jinxulin/sibyl_system/projects/CRA"
ALL_TASKS=(p1_fm2_continuous_metrics)
TOTAL=1
start_time=$(date +%s)
PREV_DONE_COUNT=0

echo '{"status": "monitoring", "total": 1, "completed": [], "pending": ["p1_fm2_continuous_metrics"], "just_completed": [], "dispatch_needed": false}' > "$MARKER"

i=0
while true; do
    i=$((i + 1))
    COMPLETED=""
    COMPLETED_JSON=""
    PENDING=""
    PENDING_JSON=""
    JUST_COMPLETED=""
    JUST_COMPLETED_JSON=""
    done_count=0

    for task_id in "${ALL_TASKS[@]}"; do
        # Check for DONE marker file on remote server
        result=$(ssh default "test -f $REMOTE_DIR/exp/results/${task_id}_DONE && echo 'DONE' || echo 'PENDING'" 2>/dev/null)

        if [ "$result" = "DONE" ]; then
            done_count=$((done_count + 1))
            if [ -z "$COMPLETED" ]; then
                COMPLETED="$task_id"
                COMPLETED_JSON="\"$task_id\""
            else
                COMPLETED="$COMPLETED,$task_id"
                COMPLETED_JSON="$COMPLETED_JSON, \"$task_id\""
            fi
        else
            if [ -z "$PENDING" ]; then
                PENDING="$task_id"
                PENDING_JSON="\"$task_id\""
            else
                PENDING="$PENDING,$task_id"
                PENDING_JSON="$PENDING_JSON, \"$task_id\""
            fi
        fi
    done

    # Detect newly completed tasks since last poll
    DISPATCH="false"
    if [ "$done_count" -gt "$PREV_DONE_COUNT" ]; then
        DISPATCH="true"
    fi
    PREV_DONE_COUNT=$done_count

    # Read progress for pending (non-DONE) tasks
    PROGRESS_JSON=""
    for task_id in "${ALL_TASKS[@]}"; do
        prog=$(ssh default "cat $REMOTE_DIR/exp/results/${task_id}_PROGRESS.json 2>/dev/null || echo ''" 2>/dev/null)
        if [ -n "$prog" ]; then
            entry="\"$task_id\": $prog"
            if [ -z "$PROGRESS_JSON" ]; then
                PROGRESS_JSON="$entry"
            else
                PROGRESS_JSON="$PROGRESS_JSON, $entry"
            fi
        fi
    done

    elapsed=$(( $(date +%s) - start_time ))
    echo "[monitor $i] $done_count/$TOTAL done (elapsed: ${elapsed}s)"

    # Write status to marker file
    if [ "$done_count" -eq "$TOTAL" ]; then
        echo '{"status": "all_complete", "completed": ['$COMPLETED_JSON'], "pending": [], "just_completed": [], "dispatch_needed": false, "progress": {'$PROGRESS_JSON'}, "elapsed_sec": '$elapsed', "poll_count": '$i'}' > "$MARKER"
        echo "[monitor] All 1 tasks complete!"
        exit 0
    fi

    echo '{"status": "monitoring", "completed": ['$COMPLETED_JSON'], "pending": ['$PENDING_JSON'], "just_completed": [], "dispatch_needed": '$DISPATCH', "progress": {'$PROGRESS_JSON'}, "elapsed_sec": '$elapsed', "poll_count": '$i'}' > "$MARKER"

    elapsed=$(( $(date +%s) - start_time ))
    if [ "$elapsed" -gt 7200 ]; then
        echo "[monitor] Timeout after 120min"
        echo '{"status": "timeout", "completed": ['$COMPLETED_JSON'], "pending": ['$PENDING_JSON'], "elapsed_sec": '$elapsed'}' > "$MARKER"
        exit 1
    fi
    sleep 300
done

background_agent.name: sibyl-experiment-supervisor
background_agent.args: /Users/jinxulin/Research/sibyl-research-system/workspaces/CRA/current PILOT default /home/jinxulin/sibyl_system '/home/jinxulin/sibyl_system/miniconda3/bin/conda run -n sibyl_CRA' p1_fm2_continuous_metrics 300 600 2000 4 true 25

breadcrumb.description: 轮询等待空闲 GPU（最多 4 张，每 10min 通过 SSH MCP 检查，无限等待）（流氓模式：<25% 显存占用也抢）
